---
title: "isHttpDataIssue()"
description: "Checks whether a value is a HTTP data issue."

<!-- generated by website/scripts/gen-api-docs.mjs; do not edit -->

Checks whether a value is a HTTP data issue.

## Import

```ts
import { isHttpDataIssue } from "@graphrefly/ts/adapters/nestjs";
```

## Signature

```ts
function isHttpDataIssue(value: unknown): value is HttpDataIssue
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `value` | `unknown` | Unknown value to check or decode. |

## Returns

`true` when the value matches the expected shape.

## Example

```ts
import { isHttpDataIssue } from "@graphrefly/ts/adapters/nestjs";
```

`packages/ts/src/adapters/nestjs.ts`
